stemHtml: In a gas turbine engine, the propelling jet is generated by…

options.a: expansion of hot gases resulting in a conversion of potential energy (pressure) into (mechanical) work.
options.b: expansion of hot gases resulting in a conversion of potential energy (pressure) into kinetic energy (velocity).
options.c: compression of hot gases resulting in a conversion of kinetic energy (velocity) into (mechanical) work.
options.d: compression of hot gases resulting in a conversion of potential energy (pressure) into kinetic energy (velocity).
